scope: Objective staff recommendation and selected-frontline objective-support labels
Desktop QA only; mobile is outside current target
flow: Reset campaign state at 第1戦略ターン
Apply 視界点奪回・観測復旧 from alert card
observations: Initial Battle objective staff cards displayed event intent labels such as 観測線保持, 補給線保持, and 主線保持.
After objective pressure, warning cards and objective panels displayed 勝利点奪回・指揮線奪回 and 視界点奪回・観測復旧.
Applying 視界点奪回・観測復旧 logged 警報対応 and 目標対応: 視界点奪回・観測復旧.
The selected responding engineer showed 優先 敵指揮, 弾薬 通常射撃, an expanded response radius, and an objective anchor near the visibility node.
QA campaign was reset to 第1戦略ターン afterward.
notes: Browser DOM snapshot was unavailable due an in-app browser compatibility error, so QA used read-only DOM evaluation plus unique button locators within the documented browser API.
